proof: function[T0: PartialOrder] { is_reflexive[T0](T0.lte) }[P]
function[T0: PartialOrder] { is_transitive[T0](T0.lte) }[P]
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[P](P.lt)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P, k1: P) { w0 < k0 and k0 < k1 and not w0 < k1 } }
let w1: P satisfy { exists(k2: P) { w0 < w1 and w1 < k2 and not w0 < k2 } }
let w2: P satisfy { w0 < w1 and w1 < w2 and not w0 < w2 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 < x1 or not x1 < x2 or x0 < x2 }[P](w0, w1, w2)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1, x1) } = is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[P](P.gte)
let w0: P satisfy { not w0 >= w0 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0) { x0 >= x0 }[P](w0)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[P](P.gte)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P, k1: P) { w0 >= k0 and k0 >= k1 and not w0 >= k1 } }
let w1: P satisfy { exists(k2: P) { w0 >= w1 and w1 >= k2 and not w0 >= k2 } }
let w2: P satisfy { w0 >= w1 and w1 >= w2 and not w0 >= w2 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 >= x1 or not x1 >= x2 or x0 >= x2 }[P](w0, w1, w2)
function[T0: PartialOrder] { is_antisymmetric[T0](T0.lte) }[P]
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[P](a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[P](b, a)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) }[P](P.gte)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P) { w0 >= k0 and k0 >= w0 and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: P satisfy { w0 >= w1 and w1 >= w0 and w1 != w0 }
function(x0: P, x1: P) { not x0 >= x1 or not x1 >= x0 or x0 = x1 }(w0, w1)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1, x1) } = is_irreflexive[T0](x0) }[P](P.lt)
let w0: P satisfy { w0 < w0 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0) { not x0 < x0 }[P](w0)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[P](P.gt)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P, k1: P) { w0 > k0 and k0 > k1 and not w0 > k1 } }
let w1: P satisfy { exists(k2: P) { w0 > w1 and w1 > k2 and not w0 > k2 } }
let w2: P satisfy { w0 > w1 and w1 > w2 and not w0 > w2 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x1 > x2 or x0 > x2 }[P](w0, w1, w2)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1, x1) } = is_irreflexive[T0](x0) }[P](P.gt)
let w0: P satisfy { w0 > w0 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0) { not x0 > x0 }[P](w0)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) } = is_asymmetric[T0](x0) }[P](P.lt)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P) { w0 < k0 and k0 < w0 } }
let w1: P satisfy { w0 < w1 and w1 < w0 }
function(x0: P, x1: P) { not x0 < x1 or not x1 < x0 or false = true }(w0, w1)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) } = is_asymmetric[T0](x0) }[P](P.gt)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P) { w0 > k0 and k0 > w0 } }
let w1: P satisfy { w0 > w1 and w1 > w0 }
function(x0: P, x1: P) { not x0 > x1 or not x1 > x0 or false = true }(w0, w1)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[P](a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[P, P](P.lt, P.lte)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P) { w0 < k0 and not w0 <= k0 } }
let w1: P satisfy { w0 < w1 and not w0 <= w1 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[P](w0, w1)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 >= x1 }[P](a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[P, P](P.gt, P.gte)
let w0: P satisfy { exists(k0: P) { w0 > k0 and not w0 >= k0 } }
let w1: P satisfy { w0 > w1 and not w0 >= w1 }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 >= x1 }[P](w0, w1)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1, x2) or x0(x2, x1) } = is_total[T0](x0) }[L](L.lte)
let w0: L satisfy { exists(k0: L) { not w0 <= k0 and not k0 <= w0 } }
let w1: L satisfy { not w0 <= w1 and not w1 <= w0 }
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 <= x1 or x1 <= x0 }[L](w0, w1)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[L](b, a)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1, x2) or x0(x2, x1) } = is_total[T0](x0) }[L](L.gte)
let w0: L satisfy { exists(k0: L) { not w0 >= k0 and not k0 >= w0 } }
let w1: L satisfy { not w0 >= w1 and not w1 >= w0 }
function(x0: L, x1: L) { x0 >= x1 or x1 >= x0 }(w0, w1)
function(x0: P, x1: P) { relation_converse(P.lte, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.lte, a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[P](a, b)
function(x0: P, x1: P) { relation_converse(P.gte, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.gte, a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T0](T0.lte, x0, x1) = x0 >= x1 }[P](b, a)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.lte, b, a)
function(x0: P, x1: P) { relation_converse(P.lt, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.lt, a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[P](a, b)
function(x0: P, x1: P) { relation_converse(P.gt, x0, x1) = u(x0, x1) }(a, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.gt, a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T0](T0.lt, x0, x1) = x0 > x1 }[P](b, a)
function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[P, P](P.lt, b, a)

goal: is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte)) and is_transitive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte)) and is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte))
proof: is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte))
not is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte))
is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte))
not is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lte))

goal: is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte)) and is_transitive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte)) and is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte))
proof: is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte))
not is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte))
is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte))
not is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gte))
not is_transitive[B](B.lt)

goal: is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lt)) and is_asymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lt)) and is_transitive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lt))
proof: not is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lt))
not is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.lt))
not is_transitive[B](B.gt)

goal: is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gt)) and is_asymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gt)) and is_transitive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gt))
proof: not is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gt))
not is_irreflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](e.map, B.gt))
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(util).eq_relation[T0](x0, x1) = (x0 = x1) }[L](a, b)
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x1 = x0 <= x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0.max(x1) = x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 <= x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 or x0 < x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 != x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(util).eq_relation[T0](x0, x1) = (x0 = x1) }[L](a, b)
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x0 = x0 >= x1 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0.max(x1) = x0 }[L](a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 >= x1 or not x0 < x1 }[L](a, b)

goal: relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_refl_trans_closure[B](B.lte)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.lte)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_refl_trans_closure[B](B.gte)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.gte)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_trans_closure[B](B.lte)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.lte)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_trans_closure[B](B.gte)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.gte)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_trans_closure[B](B.lt)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.lt)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_trans_closure[B](B.gt)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.gt)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_refl_trans_closure[B](B.lt)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.lte)
relation_pullback[A, B](f, relation_refl_trans_closure[B](B.gt)) = relation_pullback[A, B](f, B.gte)
